properties.name: app.logging.root-level
properties.description: 应用日志根级别.

properties.name: app.logging.sql.level
properties.description: 开发环境 SQL 日志级别.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用日志清理定时任务.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.retention-days
properties.description: 日志清理保留天数.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.cron
properties.description: 日志清理任务的 Cron 表达式.

properties.name: upload.enabled
properties.description: 上传模块总开关关闭后上传接口返回业务错误.

properties.name: upload.oss.endpoint
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS 访问端点.

properties.name: upload.oss.access-key-id
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS AccessKey ID.

properties.name: upload.oss.access-key-secret
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS AccessKey Secret.

properties.name: upload.oss.bucket-name
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS Bucket 名称.

properties.name: upload.oss.custom-domain
properties.description: OSS Bucket 绑定的自定义域名.

properties.name: springdoc.info.title
properties.description: OpenAPI 标题.

properties.name: springdoc.info.description
properties.description: OpenAPI 描述信息.
properties.defaultValue: Nebula 博客系统接口文档

properties.name: springdoc.info.version
properties.description: OpenAPI 版本号.

properties.name: upload.webp.enabled
properties.description: 是否在图片上传时自动转换为 WebP.

properties.name: upload.webp.quality
properties.description: WebP 压缩质量（0.0-1.0）.

properties.name: upload.webp.max-width
properties.description: 图片处理最大宽度.

properties.name: upload.webp.max-height
properties.description: 图片处理最大高度.

properties.name: upload.webp.keep-original
properties.description: WebP 转换成功后是否保留原图.

properties.name: upload.webp.failure-strategy
properties.description: WebP 转换失败时的处理策略.

properties.name: upload.webp.enable-stats
properties.description: 是否记录 WebP 转换统计日志.
